name: Amish Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 lb good quality bread, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Toast the bread cubes on two cookie sheets for 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Transfer to a large mixing bowl.
3. Remove bones from chicken and finely chop the meat (discard skin). Process in food processor while chicken is still warm.
4. Add chopped vegetables and chicken meat to the bread, along with seasonings. Toss.
5. In a medium bowl, beat eggs; add evaporated milk and broth. Pour over bread mixture and blend. The mixture will be moist.
6. Allow to stand for 1 hour.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F again.
8. Transfer dressing to an oiled 3-quart glass casserole that is 10 inches in diameter and 3 inches deep (dressing can be frozen before baking; thaw before cooking).
9. Bake dressing for 2 hours, or until the center puffs up and is golden brown on top.
